title: Career Opportunity Financial Analyst at SIDBI

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Financial Analyst at SIDBI
jsonLd.description:
We at SIDBI are looking for an experienced Financial Analyst based out of Howrah. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About SIDBI:
SIDBI is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SIDBI!
